calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing as assigned by Dept. 501.
Dept. 514, Judge Gail Dekreon; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; CSR MITCH LYON #6840
Marina Franco, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC
Plaintiff's witness Elizabeth Kershaw was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Wutong Teng Wu, sued as Wutong Teng Wu.
Default of Co-Defendant Jingheng Zhu has been duly entered on Feb. 8, 2019.
As the plaintiff's request, Does 1-10 are dismissed in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the both Defendants as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at:
55 Chumasero Drive, 9-J. San Francisco, CA
Rental Agreement is canceled, and Lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent $3,635.00
Holdover damages $4,725.63
Costs $500.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $8,860.63.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Grey, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Owner, LLC is present, represented by Liz Kershaw.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Wutong Teng Wu is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of March 11, 2019 remains on calendar. (501)
